hero.description: I design and build AI-powered products from zero to one. Focused on making complex technology feel simple, useful, and beautiful—shipping fast and iterating in public.

focus.label: Mission
focus.headline: My focus is on robust engineering, AI-native products, and scalable systems to

process.label: / How I work
process.headline: Path to shipped features
process.step1_desc: Mapping out the system constraints, data flow, and UI surface. Deciding exactly what to build and what not to build.
process.step2_desc: Deep focus engineering. Translating the mental model into solid Next.js and Python code with robust AI integrations.
process.step3_desc: Polishing the sharp edges. Adding micro-animations, optimizing performance, and listening closely to telemetry and user feedback.

cta.headline: Let's build something
cta.description: I work with teams and founders who see digital presence and AI not just as a duty, but as a strategic growth driver.

work.label: / 19 shipped projects

work.description: Shipped products, research tools, and AI experiments. Most are real projects with real users.
work.metadata_desc: Shipped products, research tools, and AI experiments.

now.label: / Updated daily
now.headline: Now
now.description: This page is updated daily by an AI agent that reviews my work and distills the highlights. Think of it as a living changelog for what I'm building, thinking, and shipping.
now.metadata_desc: What I'm currently working on, thinking about, and shipping.
